title: wedelia kerrii
intro: Wedelia kerrii, also known as the creeping zinnia or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Wedelia kerrii can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
